tasks.title: Scaffold src-tauri/ with Cargo.toml, tauri.conf.json, build.rs, capabilities
tasks.description: FR-1: Create the Tauri v2 project structure at src-tauri/ adapted from docs/src-tauri/. Cargo.toml with duckdb (bundled), tauri-plugin-dialog, serde, serde_json, chrono. tauri.conf.json configured for Data Monster (productName, identifier, devUrl pointing to SvelteKit dev server). build.rs with tauri_build::build(). capabilities/default.json with core, dialog, shell permissions.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write verification that cargo check succeeds for the src-tauri/ crate
TDD: Verify tauri.conf.json has correct productName and identifier
TDD: Verify capabilities include dialog:allow-open and dialog:allow-save

tasks.title: Create Rust state, main.rs, lib.rs, and module structure
tasks.description: FR-2: Create src-tauri/src/main.rs with Tauri builder, plugin registration (shell, dialog), DuckDbState management, and invoke_handler. Create state.rs with DuckDbState (conn Mutex<Option<Connection>>, query_cancelled Arc<AtomicBool>, interrupt_handle Mutex). Create commands/mod.rs with module declarations for database, tables, queries, files, folders, labels, saved_queries. Create utils/mod.rs and models/mod.rs.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write verification that main.rs compiles and registers all command handlers
TDD: Verify DuckDbState has conn, query_cancelled, interrupt_handle fields
TDD: Verify all command modules are declared in mod.rs

tasks.title: Implement initialize_duckdb with workspace folder and d8a_monster_ schema
tasks.description: FR-2: Create commands/database.rs with initialize_duckdb command. Opens DuckDB at <workspace>/d8a_monster.duckdb. Creates d8a_monster_table_metadata, d8a_monster_table_labels, d8a_monster_saved_queries, d8a_monster_relationships internal tables. Includes WAL corruption recovery and locked database retry logic. Cleans up orphaned metadata on init. Working directory (workspace path) passed as parameter. Workspace path persisted in <app_data_dir>/workspace.json.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test that initialize_duckdb creates .duckdb file at workspace path
TDD: Write test that all d8a_monster_ tables exist after initialization
TDD: Write test that calling initialize_duckdb twice returns 'already initialized'
TDD: Write test that orphaned metadata entries are cleaned up on init
TDD: Refactor to extract schema creation into separate function for testability
Task Logging: .specs/tauri-migration/tasks-log.json -> task_id | title | summary | is_working | timestamp | notes | decisions_made

Add get_workspace_path command that reads workspace.json. Add set_workspace_path command. On app startup, check workspace.json; if missing or path invalid, frontend shows folder picker. Add switch_workspace command for changing folders.

tasks.title: Implement file loading commands (CSV, Parquet, JSON) with workspace data folder
tasks.description: FR-3: Create commands/files.rs with load_csv_file, load_parquet_file, load_json_file. Each reads file from disk path into DuckDB via read_csv_auto/read_parquet/read_json_auto, copies source file to <workspace>/data/main/, registers table in d8a_monster_table_metadata as type 'source'. Add get_file_columns for schema preview. Add helper get_data_dir() returning <workspace>/data/.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test that load_csv_file creates table and copies file to data folder
TDD: Write test that load_parquet_file loads parquet data correctly
TDD: Write test that loaded table is registered in d8a_monster_table_metadata
TDD: Write test that source file is copied to workspace data/main/ folder
TDD: Refactor common loading logic into helper function

tasks.title: Implement execute_query and cancel_query commands
tasks.description: FR-4: Create commands/queries.rs with execute_query and cancel_query. execute_query runs SQL against DuckDB, returns JSON {columns, data}. Detects SELECT vs DML. Stores interrupt handle for cancellation. cancel_query sets AtomicBool and calls interrupt().
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test that execute_query returns {columns, data} for SELECT
TDD: Write test that execute_query handles DML statements
TDD: Write test that cancel_query interrupts a running query
TDD: Refactor value formatting into utility function

tasks.title: Handle WAL corruption and locked database scenarios

Delete corrupted WAL file and retry. Handle locked database with exponential backoff (10 attempts). Frontend shows appropriate error messages.

rules: Write test first (RED) - test must fail
Write minimal code to pass (GREEN) - no optimization
Refactor only after test passes (REFACTOR) - maintain quality
All tasks must follow TDD cycle as acceptance criteria
